---
title: "Victoria Erofeeva"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

## VERA
**V**ictoria **E**rofeeva · **R**esearch  
*Adaptive Networked Intelligence*

*Personal research website*

**Optimization Researcher | Distributed Intelligence | Multi-Agent Systems | Networked Control**

I develop mathematically grounded algorithms for adaptive learning,
distributed optimization, multi-agent coordination, and networked control
in cyber-physical and multi-robot systems.

My work focuses on decision-making under uncertainty, nonstationarity,
noisy and delayed feedback, and communication constraints.

### Research areas

- Adaptive Learning and Efficient Model Optimization
- Distributed Intelligence and Multi-Agent Systems
- Networked Control and Multi-Robot Autonomy

[Research](research.qmd) · [Publications](publications.qmd) · [Blog](blog/index.qmd) · [CV](cv.qmd)
